name: Find Steed
description: You summon a spirit that assumes the form of a unusually intelligent, strong, and loyal steed, creating a long-lasting bond with it. The steed takes on a form you choose: Camel, Donkey, Elk, Horse, Mastiff, Mule, Pony, or Warhorse. The steed has the statistics of the chosen form, though it is a Celestial, Fey, or Fiend (your choice) instead of its normal creature type. If your steed has ever been slain, you can cast this spell to revive it.
